raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is in regards to XXXX to which you submitted to me the signed terms and conditions from the merchant, as well as a typed and signed statement from the merchant. 1. This is NOT my signature & 2. This statement is NOT accurate.

I have a witness that we can both sign a notarized affidavit confirming this. We also have the entire experience recorded as further evidence.

My next steps will be to file complaints with the FDIC & XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX as well as I am willing to go into arbitration with Barclays Delaware if this matter is not resolved properly. You can not submit to me forged signature documents and a non-notarized affidavit by the merchant and expect me to just accept it.
